equipment_description: Elcometer 456 Top Digital DFT Gauge with Standard Probe
linked_stage_form_use: FRM-U2-016B Primer DFT, FRM-U2-016C Final Coat DFT + Total System DFT
calibration_lab: Stancal Metrology Pvt. Ltd. (NABL accredited, CC-2243)
physical_correlation_status: Verified — serial 456-2024-11823 on sticker matches certificate body and physical engraving on instrument.
downstream_availability_status: Available — appears in FRM-U2-016B and U2-016C DFT instrument dropdown.

photos.title: Calibration certificate cover (NABL-AC-2026-118)
photos.note: Certificate from Stancal Metrology; clearly shows traceability to NPL standards.

photos.title: Instrument with calibration sticker
photos.note: Sticker shows Calibrated 05-Apr-2026, Due 04-Oct-2026; matches certificate.

photos.title: Instrument body — serial engraving
photos.note: Engraved serial 456-2024-11823 visible; matches sticker and certificate.

photos.title: Verification against reference foil
photos.note: Reading 250 microns on 250-micron reference foil supplied with instrument.

iqra_review_remarks: Calibration valid for 178 days. Physical verification against reference foil confirmed. Instrument cleared for U2-016B and U2-016C use.
